name: ygt-harness-router
description: Quality-first Sol, Terra, and Luna routing with token budgets, lifecycle hooks, and evidence-led handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Route Codex work across Sol, Terra, and Luna with evidence-based budgets.
interface.longDescription: Adds deterministic capability scoring, bounded subagent roles, rollout-budget templates, context handoffs, privacy-bounded telemetry, and lifecycle hooks without optimizing cost at the expense of quality.
defaultPrompt: Route this task to Sol, Terra, or Luna and explain the quality gate.
Create a compact engineering handoff before this context grows further.
Audit this session for duplicate work and token concentration.
